name: servicenow
title: ServiceNow
description: Search and explore content across your ServiceNow instances
author: robertoalvarezalonso

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Text
commands.description: Search in ServiceNow. Pass the text you want to search for (or copy it to the clipboard) to jump straight to results; otherwise browse your search history and search inline.

commands.name: search-code
commands.title: Search Code
commands.description: Search inside ServiceNow scripts (business rules, script includes, client scripts, UI scripts, etc.) using the Code Search API. Pass a term to jump straight to results, or open the form to enter one. Requires the sn_codesearch plugin in the instance.

commands.name: manage-instance-profiles
commands.title: Manage Instance Profiles
commands.description: Configure and manage profiles to connect to your ServiceNow instances.

commands.name: open-all-instances
commands.title: Open All Instances
commands.description: Open all configured ServiceNow instances in the browser.

commands.name: open-instance
commands.title: Open Instance
commands.description: Open a ServiceNow instance in the browser. If an instance URL or alias is provided, it will open that instance; otherwise, it will open the currently selected instance.

commands.name: open-current-page-instance
commands.title: Open Current Page in Another Instance
commands.description: Open the current ServiceNow page in any instance defined in your instance profiles. If no instance URL or alias is provided, it will open the page in the selected instance profile.

commands.name: explore-tables
commands.title: Explore Tables
commands.description: Browse and explore the tables of the platform.

commands.name: search-resources
commands.title: Search Developer Portal
commands.description: Search the ServiceNow Developer Portal across documentation, API references, blogs, learning content, and Share apps.

commands.name: explore-navigation-history
commands.title: Explore Navigation History
commands.description: Browse the list of pages and modules you've visited.

commands.name: explore-favorites
commands.title: Manage Favorites
commands.description: View and manage your favorite items and groups.

commands.name: explore-navigation-menu
commands.title: Explore Navigation Menu
commands.description: Browse the list of application menus and their modules.

commands.name: search-sysid
commands.title: Find Record by Sys ID
commands.description: Find the record that owns a given Sys ID and open it. Admins only.

commands.name: find-references
commands.title: Find Record References
commands.description: Find tables and columns where a record is referenced. Requires an admin profile (uses /sys.scripts.do).

commands.name: cancel-my-transactions
commands.title: Cancel My Transactions
commands.description: Stop a long-running transaction that has locked you out of your ServiceNow session, without opening a new browser or private window. If no instance URL or alias is provided, uses the currently selected instance.

preferences.name: openMode
preferences.title: Open content using
preferences.description: Select how you prefer to open ServiceNow pages and content (direct link, nav_to/Polaris, or SOW view).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
